name: isca-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for ISCA, the ACM/IEEE International Symposium on Computer Architecture: venue fit and the architecture-conference calendar, the November abstract+paper gate, simulation-grade evaluation, the two-round review with rebuttal and revision, camera-ready, and ACM-badged artifact evaluation. Grounded in ISCA 2026 official pages checked on 2026-07-08.
